calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-17-2021 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Jan-28-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Richard E. Washington, a/k/a Richard Washington, and the Washington, LLC, dba Luxurious Nail Boutique.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Brian Miles, Esq. appeared for plaintiff the National Collection Agency, Inc.
Matthew Keeperman, President of the National Collection Agency, Inc., and Rachel Aoanan, Risk Managment Officer at Main Street Launch, were placed under oath and testified.
Ms. Aoanan, and Messrs. Miles and Keeperman, appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendants Richard E. Washington, a/k/a Richard Washington, and the Washington, LLC, dba Luxurious Nail Boutique.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract was filed on October 17, 2020, and personally served on defendants Richard E. Washington, a/k/a Richard Washington, and the Washington, LLC, dba Luxurious Nail Boutique, on January 31, 2020.
Default as to both defendants was entered on March 3, 2020.
DOE defendants were dismissed on March 3, 2020.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff the National Collection Agency, Inc., and against the defaulted defendants Richard E. Washington, a/k/a Richard Washington, and the Washington, LLC, dba Luxurious Nail Boutique, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $84,642.58.
Prejudgment Interest - $10,228.14.
Attorney Fees - $2,825.00.
Costs - $1,759.80.

Total - $99,455.52.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.
